data.title: Amazon's 'Remarkable Alexa' Is Coming—Here's What To Expect From The AI Overhaul And Its Potential $10 Monthly Fee
data.description: Amazon is set to unveil a major AI-powered upgrade to Alexa, internally known as "Remarkable Alexa," with the goal of enhancing user interactions and potentially introducing a paid subscription model to address profitability challenges.

data.title: Nissan CEO Seeks To End Honda Merger Talks: Report
data.description: Nissan Motor Co. CEO Makoto Uchida has informed Honda Motor Co. CEO Toshihiro Mibe of his intention to terminate discussions on a potential merger, Asahi reported Thursday.

data.title: Bitcoin, Dogecoin Drop, Ethereum Drop After Fed Vice Chair Pours Cold Water On Rate Cut Expectations: Top Trader Sees BTC At $500,000 And ETH At $20,000
data.description: Broader cryptocurrency markets saw declines over the past 24 hours, with total market capitalization dropping 2.01% to $3.17 trillion.

data.title: Microstrategy, Qualcomm, Arm Holdings, Ford, And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: U.S. markets were in the green on Wednesday, with the Nasdaq Composite rising approximately 40 points to 19,692.33. The Dow Jones saw a slight increase of 0.7%, reaching 44,873.28, while the S&P 500 experienced a rise of nearly 0.4%, settling at 6,061.48.

data.title: Google Joins Meta, Amazon In Winding Up DEI Hiring — Memo Reveals Details
data.description: Google has decided to eliminate its DEI hiring targets, citing obligations as a federal contractor and recent court rulings, joining other major tech companies like Meta and Amazon in scaling back diversity initiatives.
